note: IMPORTANT: this single image must be a 2x2 grid of 4 equal square cells, with NO gaps, NO borders, and NO visible seams between cells, and NO cell numbering/labels drawn in the image. Each described cell below goes in its exact row/column position, reading left-to-right then top-to-bottom.
how_to_use: Copia el texto de 'full_prompt' de UNA celda a la vez y pegalo en Gemini para esa posicion exacta (fila/columna), o pega la nota 'note' de arriba una sola vez seguida de los 'full_prompt' de TODAS las celdas de este archivo en un unico mensaje para pedir la parrilla completa de una vez. Cada full_prompt ya trae TODAS las normas de estilo incluidas, no hace falta agregar nada mas.

cells.full_prompt: seamless tileable top-down grass texture: warm green with small darker speckles and a few subtle blade-of-grass details, flat painterly board-game style, no shadows, no objects on top. Camera: strict orthographic top-down view (90 degrees), no perspective. Art style: painterly flat cartoon board-game texture (not photorealistic), matching a sticker/cardboard-piece aesthetic. Tileability: this texture MUST be seamlessly tileable -- its left edge must match its right edge, and its top edge must match its bottom edge, so it can repeat infinitely with no visible seam. Content: pure ground texture only -- no objects, no units, no buildings, no shadows cast by anything on top of it. Negative prompt: no perspective, no 3D relief, no objects on top of the texture, no visible seams at the edges, no text, no watermark, no vignette.
